channel.title: StageGlass Desktop Player
channel.description: Stable-channel updates for StageGlass Desktop Player.

item.title: DesktopPlayer 1.2.0
item.description:
StageGlass Desktop Player — 1.2.0

This update turns PropPlayer into a more dependable on-set Mac prop, with one predictable full-screen mode, explicit startup behavior, stronger scene loading, and a major fidelity pass across the simulated desktop.

  • One Stage Full Screen. The green window button, View menu, and keyboard shortcut now enter the same edge-to-edge stage mode. The menu bar and Dock stay hidden, and the same command always exits cleanly.
  • Choose what opens at launch. Startup settings now offer Reopen Last Session, Open Empty Desktop, and Always Open This Package. Reopen Last is the default and remembers successful local and PropMaster loads of both scene and free-roam packages.
  • Safer package recovery. Startup packages are stored transactionally. A damaged or failed replacement cannot erase the last known-good session, and launch failures now produce a clear error instead of silently opening an unrelated package.
  • Desktop-at-start scenes. Scenes can open with several authored, arranged windows already on screen. Window-targeted beats keep addressing the intended window throughout playback, including multiple independent Safari windows.
  • Better browser props. Safari pages support tall scrolling artwork, reliable page-relative tap zones, typing regions, independent window state, and settled background dressing windows.
  • A camera-ready Mac desktop. Photos gained its production library layout, translucent toolbar, real import flow, sidebar depth, and scene-clock behavior. The Dock, menu bar, wallpaper, sidebars, notifications, and Golden Gate glass now respond to the actual backdrop instead of reading as flat overlays.
  • Custom surfaces and VFX. App Builder surfaces now play natively on desktop with ordered interactions and deterministic replay. Desktop VFX controls add calibrated plate colors, markers, and persistent operator settings.
  • More reliable show control. PropMaster package pushes load and open consistently, disconnected remote sessions release stuck input locks, remote-port recovery is bounded, and free-roam packages load faster with stronger cache validation.

item.title: DesktopPlayer 1.1.1
item.description:
StageGlass Desktop Player — 1.1.1

On-set fixes for the free-roam desktop, driven by law-office set testing.

  • Screensavers are operator-controlled. The idle countdown that could auto-start a screensaver mid-take is gone. Screensavers engage only from the Director remote, and dismiss only on a deliberate click or key press — brushing or moving the mouse no longer kills them.
  • Screensavers and wallpapers are truly full screen. Images now pin to the real window edges at any window size, including under the title bar. The gap that let the bottom of the taskbar peek out beneath a screensaver is closed.
  • Color temperature behaves like camera white balance. Warm and cool adjustments now shift the white point instead of adding colored light, so warm no longer brightens brown set dressing. Wallpaper and screensaver art stretch-renders without cropping or drifting off-center.

item.title: DesktopPlayer 1.1.0
item.description:
StageGlass Desktop Player — 1.1.0

The free-roam desktop grows up: production-art office packs, a living app suite, and a fleet remote.

  • Production-art free-roam packs. Desktops built from licensed production art with measured icon grids, taskbar hotspots, and chromeless art windows that stay pixel-aligned at any window size.
  • A real app suite for background actors. Browser with live history, search and rich authored web pages; Mail; Files with PDF viewing; Word-style documents with full-page scrolling; Firm Chat messenger with typed replies; Calendar; Contacts; Reminders; Notes; Settings.
  • Windows behave like windows. Resize with limits, minimize that animates into the taskbar, up to three windows per app, and per-seat startup layouts so a wall of machines never boots identical.
  • Desktop Wall fleet control (player side). Shuffle to a seeded state, capture and restore exact desktop states between takes, receive pushed packages over the network and auto-open them, and report live thumbnails to the operator.
  • On-set operator controls. Remote screensaver, keyboard/mouse input lock with a local emergency escape, blackout, brightness, and color grading including temperature.
  • Fill Entire Screen mode. Optional fullscreen that extends behind the MacBook camera housing so props read truly edge-to-edge on camera.
  • Quality of life. Ambient idle activity defers to real users, a visible warning when the remote port is taken by another app, and package swaps always start from a clean desktop.

item.title: DesktopPlayer 1.0.0
item.description:
StageGlass Desktop Player — 1.0.0

First signed, notarized, Sparkle-updating DesktopPlayer release.

  • Desktop prop playback in one app. Mac, Windows, Linux, and custom desktop skins ship from the unified DesktopPlayer target for laptop and monitor props.
  • Free-roam desktop foundation. The app includes the free-roam desktop pack runtime foundation for live background desktops and on-rails office screens.
  • NDI-ready macOS distribution. Bundles the DesktopPlayer NDI runtime dependency and ships as a Developer ID notarized DMG.
  • Sparkle updates. DesktopPlayer now has its own stable appcast and Check for Updates... command, separate from StageGlass Director.
